compositional_truth_check.details: The biome is currently devoid of any visible vegetative life. The registry identifies P1, P2, P3, and P4, but the visual evidence confirms only empty soil and debris.

plant_audit.p1: Yellow pot contains only dark, damp soil and a sensor probe. No plant matter detected.
plant_audit.p2: Black pot is indistinguishable from the background or empty; no foliage present.
plant_audit.p3: Black pot contains white debris (likely eggshell fragments) on the soil surface. No Pothos or rabbit anchor visible.
plant_audit.p4: No distinct pot or specimen identified; assumed lost or integrated into empty soil mass.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark and damp across all visible containers. No signs of fungal bloom, but no signs of life.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of white, calcified debris (eggshells) in P3. The scale anchor (white rabbit) is missing from the frame.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The sequence shows a static, empty environment. There is no growth, no movement, and no recovery. The state of the biome has remained stagnant and devoid of plant life throughout the 5-day observation window.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: Total biological failure. The environment is currently a sterile soil setup with no active specimens.
visual_health_inference.evidence: Zero chlorophyll-bearing tissue detected in any frame.

anomalies: Presence of non-biological debris (eggshells) in P3.
Total absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: As a botanical observer, I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image stack. The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the physical reality of the desk. The containers are present, but they are essentially empty vessels containing only soil and sensor equipment. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The environment appears to be a failed or abandoned propagation setup. The white debris in P3 suggests an attempt at soil amendment or a previous, now removed, decorative element. No recovery or growth has occurred over the 5-day period.
